notes.text: This card needs to referrence all data the pipeline aggregated successfully or not. It should be a summary of all data scrapes, and survey information with a clear success or failed or upgrade flag across all avaiable data points. example, a free tier might scrape reddit or X, but an upgraded account will scrape both + instagram and whatever other platform we establish in the pipeline. so this card need to support that communicating what free tier data points it pulled from, and then as a user upgrades and reruns new data points are tracked and opened up accordigly.
notes.author: edittraxnft@gmail.com

notes.text: Additionally, this cards copy needss to provide analyzation of the data it has access to and upsell the client in a way that describes what  data we pulled from to creatte a basic brief / analasys and how it can improve with additional data on enhanced tiers.
notes.author: edittraxnft@gmail.com

notes.text: The brief will be more of aggregation of all cards weve drawn data from insterted into a client brief. We wont need to reanalyze the content after each card has provided its own content, we will integrate that existing content into the brief, while writing a short paragraph summary for the home page that evaluates the quality of the brief / brand per its available data
notes.author: edittraxnft@gmail.com

history.by: assistant · masterplan amendment A2 + new phase P7
